title: Just who is Shinji Destined for
display_title: Just who is Shinji Destined for
wikitext:
[]: Just who is Shinji Destined for? Post by EVA-01X » Sat Jul 10, 2004 7:30 pm This is truly an interesting topic. The one Shinji loves is? IMO it's Asuka, because like they say oppisites atract. Or maybe I'm just stuck in Ranma mode...

[]: Post by MongolSquad » Sat Jul 10, 2004 7:37 pm If Rei hadn't fallen into a bunch of nice little chunky bite-sized pieces, I thing Shinji would tap that. But then again in EoE out of all the girls he ended up by Asukas side. So I think he's going with Asuka seeing that shes a little normal but I think if Rei and him had more time it could've been something.

[]: Post by TheMessiah » Sat Jul 10, 2004 7:49 pm i actually had a discussion like this earlier Shinji would grow up to be like Kaji Asuka would grow up to be like Misato

[]: Post by EVA-01X » Sat Jul 10, 2004 7:56 pm So Shinji would become an Ultra Pimp and Asuka would become a drunkard commanding officer?

[]: Post by Asuka Loves Toji » Sat Jul 10, 2004 9:09 pm i despise shinj x Asuka cuz personally i think Asuka would never go for Shinji too much evidence in the show then again i know a bunch of you will be like "but yeah theres evidence for the Shinji x Asuka too!"

[]: Post by secondson » Sat Jul 10, 2004 11:59 pm I'm not trying to be a downer here, but it's kind of a moot point - especially going by EOE rules. Misato's twice his age (and dead), Rei's part Yui (and dead), and, hell, even freaking Kaworu's from an Angel (alien, according to the PS2 game), and he's dead too. That pretty much leaves Asuka; as far as I see things, if Shinji was supposed to be with anyone else, it would've been written that way... Not trying to be rude - I'm just saying.

[]: Post by Timesplitter 01 » Sun Jul 11, 2004 12:01 am Asuka and Shinji do like each other , even though they try to hide it. It's like ash and misty ( in Pokemon, from memory) , misty likes Ash , and Ash has no clue .But he sometimes reveals his true feelings for misty. Of course it is more obvious with Shinji and Asuka. Its all in the Dialogue ( what they say in the episodes) and actions. 1. Plus people who fight love each other ( a saying from somewhere) 2. oppisites atract 3. Shinji goes blistic ( screams) when he sees what had happen to Asuka in EoE. 4.He tries to kiss her , his heart is racing ( indicated by the music player) Asuka and Shinji are meant to be together

[]: Post by Asuka Langley » Sun Jul 11, 2004 12:11 am TheMessiah wrote: i actually had a discussion like this earlier Shinji would grow up to be like Kaji Asuka would grow up to be like Misato

[]: Post by TheMessiah » Sun Jul 11, 2004 12:25 am Asuka Langley wrote: TheMessiah wrote: i actually had a discussion like this earlier Shinji would grow up to be like Kaji Asuka would grow up to be like Misato

[]: Post by Timesplitter 01 » Sun Jul 11, 2004 12:29 am I hate to intrupt , but isn't what you doing sorta spamming. But I have to agree with this Shinji would grow up to be like Kaji Asuka would grow up to be like Misato but is would be slightly different versions of each , becasue of the different character traits and attitudes

[]: Post by EVA-01X » Sun Jul 11, 2004 12:50 am so a cowardly ultra pimp and a loudmouth bitchy drunkard?

[]: Post by sadsadshinji » Sun Jul 11, 2004 12:50 am i read from a website that Asuka is supposed to also embody Rei in the final scene (with the bandages) it probably isnt a coincidence but i thought that Rei had her left eye covered up and Asuka had her right bandaged.... Asuka is definatly the choice...she and Shinji are the opposite ends of the spectrum while dealing with the same situation: Shinji turned inward, while Asuka turned outward, as a result, Shinji becomes reclusive and Asuka becomes a complete extrovert... this shared past is what links them together...

[]: Post by EVA-01X » Sun Jul 11, 2004 12:54 am And as I said before, oppisites attract

[]: Post by Timesplitter 01 » Sun Jul 11, 2004 12:59 am sadsadshinji wrote: i read from a website that Asuka is supposed to also embody Rei in the final scene (with the bandages) it probably isnt a coincidence but i thought that Rei had her left eye covered up and Asuka had her right bandaged.... Asuka is definatly the choice...she and Shinji are the opposite ends of the spectrum while dealing with the same situation: Shinji turned inward, while Asuka turned outward, as a result, Shinji becomes reclusive and Asuka becomes a complete extrovert... this shared past is what links them together...

[]: Post by Asuka Loves Toji » Sun Jul 11, 2004 1:47 am id personally be disgusted if i wound up with someone the oppsite as mejust like how Asuka feels at the end of eoe

[]: Post by TheMessiah » Sun Jul 11, 2004 1:49 am she doesnt hate him seriously people, learn some psychology

[]: Post by Asuka Loves Toji » Sun Jul 11, 2004 1:55 am i didnt say she hates him im just saying she was disgusted that she thought she had feelings for him, r that she was the last one with him. but hey its really up to what you think we've never gotten a clear answer form anno

[]: Post by Asuka Langley » Sun Jul 11, 2004 1:59 am Timesplitter 01 wrote: I hate to intrupt , but isn't what you doing sorta spamming. But I have to agree with this Shinji would grow up to be like Kaji Asuka would grow up to be like Misato but is would be slightly different versions of each , becasue of the different character traits and attitudes

[]: Post by Asuka Loves Toji » Sun Jul 11, 2004 2:01 am i say if it werent for the jaggin off scene Shinji is too nice of a guy to turn out like Kaji but uhh that suggests other wise

[]: Post by TheMessiah » Sun Jul 11, 2004 2:03 am what are you talking about Kaji is one of the nicest guys in the series
